name: Balance of Harmony
description: This scale bears celestial symbols on one pan and fiendish symbols on the other. You can use the scale to cast {@spell detect evil and good} as a ritual. Doing so requires you to place the scale on a solid surface, then sprinkle the pans with holy water or place a transparent gem worth 100 gp in each pan. The scale remains motionless if it detects nothing, tips to one side or the other for good (consecrated) or evil (desecrated), and fluctuates slightly if it detects a creature appropriate to th
